name: Chocolate Dream Pie
recipeIngredient: JELL-O (R) Chocolate Flavor Instant Pudding 2 packages
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, add DREAM WHIP (R) and follow package instructions for preparation.
2. Add the remaining cold milk to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Whisk in the JELL-O (R) Chocolate Flavor Instant Pudding using high speed for about 2 minutes, scraping the sides of the bowl occasionally.
4. Pour the chilled whipped topping into the prepared pie shell.
5. Chill the pie for at least 4 hours before serving.
